final_prompt.prompt:
Create a short-form video vertical cover for a gaming monitor launch (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a minimalist premium aesthetic — exact restraint level and material choice are yours
Composition: must be rule-of-thirds (三分线构图)
Subject: must include the 8k GGU gaming monitor as focal point
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a premium tech atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "8k GGU 电竞显示器 1000hz" (large, primary headline), "全球首发全新面板 低延迟 完美色彩" (secondary)
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must feature large headline text for visual impact
Avoid:
